Home/Products/Shilp Drone
PROTOTYPE RENDER

Learn to fly, safely

Local Control

Direct RF connection to controller. No cloud latency, no forced login.

HD Camera

1080p recording to local SD card. Your footage stays with you.

Safety First

Built-in geofencing and altitude limits for safe learning.

Programmable

Open API for students to program flight paths locally.

Privacy Guarantee

What happens in your room,
stays in your room.

Most smart devices are data vacuums. Micro Bot is different. It has no Wi-Fi chip, no cloud connection, and no storage for recordings. It is physically impossible for us to spy on you.

No Wi-Fi

Zero internet connectivity. Updates happen via USB cable only.

No Cloud

All processing happens on the device's local processor.

No Recording

Microphone data is processed in real-time and instantly discarded.

Development Roadmap

Phase 1: Prototyping

Initial flight controller design and frame testing. (Completed)

Phase 2: Beta Testing

Field testing with select users in India. (Current)

Phase 3: Public Launch

Expected availability: Q4 2024

Shilp Drone

Consumer / Educational Drone

₹12,999COMING SOON

We are currently finalizing the design and firmware. Join the waitlist to get notified when pre-orders open.

No spam. Only product updates.
